Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Structured Settlement Payment
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
JESSENIA ZALDANA, PETITIONER ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - MS. ZALDANA WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED BY THE COURT REGARDING HER UNDERSTANDING OF THE SETTLEMENT AND THE STRUCTURED PAYMENT ON HER BEHALF. PETITIONER JESSENIA ZALDANA'S Petition For Approval Of Structured Settlement Payment IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
